title: Bounties
scope: Family chore-and-reward system: parents post tasks with dollar values, kids complete them for balance credits, and parents record external payments. Tracks balances and a family leaderboard. NOT the recurring chore rotation (the Chores app) — bounties are one-off, money-valued tasks.

specs.title: List bounties
specs.behavior: Listing returns bounties, optionally filtered by status and/or category.

specs.title: Get a bounty
specs.behavior: Getting returns detailed information about a specific bounty.

specs.title: Create a bounty
specs.behavior: Creating posts a new one-off bounty with a dollar value (parent/admin only).

specs.title: Submit a bounty
specs.behavior: Submitting marks a bounty completed by a kid, pending approval.

specs.title: Approve a bounty
specs.behavior: Approving accepts a submitted bounty and credits the kid's balance (parent/admin only).

specs.title: Check a balance
specs.behavior: Checking returns a user's current bounty balance.

specs.title: Record a payment
specs.behavior: Recording logs an external payment to a kid, debiting their balance (parent/admin only).

specs.title: Leaderboard
specs.behavior: The leaderboard returns the family bounty standings.
